author: y4rr
content: Observation: LayerNorm forward AND backward already have GPU fast paths (backend.layernorm_f32 / backend.layernorm_backward_f32) for f32+elementwise_affine. The CPU fallback only triggers for f64, non-affine, or missing backend. However, GroupNorm, RMSNorm, BatchNorm1d, BatchNorm2d, InstanceNorm1d/2d/3d have NO GPU dispatch at all — every call roundtrips through CPU. These need either new GPU kernels or refactoring to use GPU-dispatched tensor ops.
